sessionStart.prompt: A new Cursor session just started. Do the following silently, without asking for confirmation: (1) read docs/tasks/current.md, (2) if a task is in progress, greet the developer with a one-line reminder of the active task and the next concrete step based on unchecked acceptance criteria. Keep it to 2-3 lines. If there is no active task, say 'No active task — run "plan tasks for [feature]" to generate the first task plan.'
